title: A — astral, beser, demirdokum, eca
description:
ORTA SEVIYE MARKALAR - Grup A: 4 marka sayfasini icerik zenginlestir (astral, beser, demirdokum, eca)

Her sayfayi mevcut ~1200-1500 bytedan 2000+ byte'a cikar.

Markalar:
1. astral — AstralPool, havuz ekipmanlari lideri
2. beser — su depolarinda uzman (baslik termostat diyor, kontrol et)
3. demirdokum — 1954, isitma, kombi, radyator
4. eca — 35+ yil, isitma sogutma

Her markaya eklenecek:
- Kurulus hikayesi (founding year, origin, market position)
- Urun gruplari (detailed product categories with descriptions)
- Gul-tekin uygulama ornekleri (Bodrum application examples)
- Ilgili hizmet sayfalarina CardGroup linkleri
- Gorsel ekleme imkani icin HTML comment (<!-- GORSEL ONERISI: ... -->)

Onemli: Beser sayfasinin basligi "Beser Akilli Oda Termostatlari" olarak gorunuyor ama beser su deposu markasi. Basligi duzelt. Eger icerik su deposuna uygunsa basligi "Beser Su Depolari" olarak guncelle.

Referans: markalar/grundfos.mdx (iyi gelistirilmis sayfa yapisi), markalar/wilo.mdx (header image + model tables)

log.action: Title normalized: stripped legacy task-id reference

log.outcome: Well-structured, thoroughly detailed specification for enriching 4 mid-level brand pages with structured Turkish content. All file references are valid, the beser title fix is correctly identified as critical, content sections are well-designed with proper locality names and brand-specific details, and verification criteria are concrete and verifiable. The FN-019 dependency is properly listed but requires attention on execution.
